title: Bank of New York Mellon (BK)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on BNY Mellon using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what BK is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ouxxpmaw>
BNY Mellon is a slow-growing but highly profitable custody bank. Revenue grew 7.8% in FY2025, but long-term structural growth is closer to low single digits. 4% reflects modest AUA/AUM growth and continued cost discipline.

discountRate.title: Discount Rate (WACC)
discountRate.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ouxxpmaw>
Custody banks have less credit risk than traditional lenders. A 9% discount rate represents a modest premium over the 10-year Treasury, appropriate for a systemically important financial institution with highly recurring fee revenue.

terminalGrowth.title: Terminal Growth Rate
terminalGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-ouxxpmaw>
A 2% perpetual growth rate aligns with long-term inflation targets and acknowledges that custody banking is a mature oligopoly. It won't outpace global GDP growth indefinitely.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
